name: Free Shipping Setup
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Free shipping is a great incentive to attract buyers to your store. To setup a free shipping service that applies to all products:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " and select "}, {"text": "Shipping Options", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Add New Shipping Option", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Set My Own Pricing", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Free Domestic", "bold": true}, {"text": " from, the simple options."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Name your shipping option\u00a0"}, {"text": "Free Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " or similar, and add a description that customers can see. Set the availability to "}, {"text": "PO Boxes", "bold": true}, {"text": " (if you can ship to PO Boxes), then move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Review the settings, and click "}, {"text": "Complete", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can also change the wording of the free shipping text customers see when they select the shipping option. You can change this by navigating to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Click the "}, {"text": "Web Store", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab and click "}, {"text": "Checkout Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Shipping Rules", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab and here you have the option to turn off certain features at the checkout, set your default shipping options and free shipping text."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your free shipping option\u00a0will now be created for all shipping categories. If you want free shipping to only apply to certain products, you can edit the method and set a "}, {"text": "Maximum Weight", "bold": true}, {"text": ", remove "}, {"text": "Shipping Categories", "bold": true}, {"text": ", or turn off certain user groups."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Apply Free Shipping to Specific Products"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The above steps will make free shipping available to all products. If you only want some products to include free shipping you need to create a new shipping category with the free shipping option in it, and assign the shipping category to products. The steps to do this are:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Remove free shipping from the default and dangerous goods shipping categories."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a new shipping category called free shipping"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add free shipping and any other paid shipping options (e.g. express, registered) to this category."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Assign this shipping category to products that you want to offer free shipping."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "More information can be found in the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1628-add-a-shipping-category", "children": [{"text": "add a shipping category"}]}, {"text": " documentation."}]}]
